meta.description: A decade of precision rail maintenance across five countries — Xapika Engineering's history, principles, and operating standard.

header.title: From Istanbul to Tashkent, one operating discipline.
header.subtitle: Ten years of rail maintenance precision, delivered across five countries without a single contract default.

history.title: A decade of precision across five countries.
history.subtitle: Each milestone is verified by client records, regulator logs, and our internal incident-free index.

events.event: Poland HQ Relocated to New Facility

vision.title: Three commitments. Tested under fire.
vision.subtitle: These are not slogans on a slide deck. They are the conditions under which our crews deploy, the metrics our regulators audit, and the standards our customers paid for.

items.title: Perfect Work.
items.body: We don't ship "good enough." Every maintenance task closes against a verifiable checklist — signed by the technician, audited by the regulator.

items.title: Safe Operations.
items.body: A nine-year zero-incident record across five countries. Safety is not a campaign — it is the operating boundary inside which speed, cost, and uptime are negotiated.

items.title: Precise Engineering.
items.body: Every part replaced is traced. Every work order is timestamped. Precision is what makes a fleet of 230 cars feel like one.

ceo.title: A message from our CEO.
ceo.subtitle: Awaiting CEO content — Harika provides next.
ceo.awaitingNote: Awaiting CEO message — content arriving from Harika

org.title: Cross-functional teams across five countries.
org.subtitle: From Warsaw HQ to Cairo and Tashkent, our teams operate as one unit.

clients.title: Trusted by national rail operators.
clients.subtitle: From Seoul to Cairo, Xapika serves the operators that move millions every day.

meta.description: Five maintenance disciplines under one operating standard — Xapika Engineering's solutions for rail operators.

header.title: Five disciplines. One operating discipline.
header.subtitle: From daily inspection to heavy overhaul, every workstream meets the same audit standard.

hero.title: Daily precision. Continuous uptime.
hero.subtitle: Inspections, functional checks, and minor repairs that keep fleets running every single day.

whatWeDo.title: Five routines that protect daily uptime.

items.title: Daily inspection
items.desc: Pre-departure visual and functional checks against a regulator-aligned checklist — signed before release.

items.title: Functional check
items.desc: Brake, door, HVAC, and pantograph response tests verified against threshold values, not gut feel.

items.title: Minor repair
items.desc: In-depot fixes that don't require shop time — closed within the same operating window.

items.title: Cleaning & sanitation
items.desc: Interior and exterior cleaning to regulator-grade specification, scheduled around revenue service.

items.title: Trip-back diagnostics
items.desc: Quick fault triage on returning units — escalates to heavy maintenance only when warranted.
Daily inspection and functional checks across 100 high-speed units, sustained through wartime conditions since 2022.
Round-the-clock light maintenance for 123 trams from the Warsaw depot, scheduled around municipal service windows.

cta.title: Need round-the-clock fleet readiness?
cta.subtitle: We deploy depot crews on rolling shifts so your trains depart on time, every day, with no surprises.

hero.title: Comprehensive overhaul. Verified safety.
hero.subtitle: Heavy maintenance to restore performance, enhance reliability, and ensure long-term operational safety — every action audited.

whatWeDo.title: Five disciplines under one safety warranty.

items.title: Overhaul
items.desc: Full vehicle disassembly, inspection, and rebuild against OEM specification — closed under warranty.

items.title: Bogie maintenance
items.desc: Frame inspection, suspension renewal, and traction motor recertification under controlled depot conditions.

items.title: Brake system
items.desc: Pneumatic and electric brake overhaul, valve replacement, and full system pressure verification.

items.title: Wheelset turning
items.desc: Profile re-machining, axle inspection, and reassembly to UIC tolerance — measured before release.

items.title: Component refurbishment
items.desc: Couplers, doors, HVAC, and electrical assemblies stripped, restored, and benchmarked before reinstallation.
100 high-speed units under continuous heavy overhaul cycle since 2017 — uninterrupted through wartime.
123-unit tram fleet on a rolling overhaul schedule from the Warsaw depot, delivered to municipal audit standard.

cta.title: Ready to schedule a heavy overhaul cycle?
cta.subtitle: Our maintenance team can scope your fleet and deliver a written program within two weeks.

hero.title: Parts that arrive before the train stops.
hero.subtitle: Sourcing, warehousing, and inventory orchestration across 50+ partners on three continents.

whatWeDo.title: Five disciplines that keep parts flowing.

items.title: Sourcing
items.desc: OEM and approved-aftermarket parts procured across European and Asian supplier networks under a single accountable contract.

items.title: Warehousing
items.desc: Climate-controlled facilities in Poland and Korea hold critical inventory close to the depots that consume it.

items.title: Inventory orchestration
items.desc: Real-time stock visibility across depots, with reorder thresholds tuned to fleet maintenance cycles.

items.title: Logistics
items.desc: Just-in-time delivery routed straight to maintenance crews — measured against the work order, not the warehouse.

items.title: Quality assurance
items.desc: Incoming inspection and serialized traceability on every part — origin to installation, recorded.

keyStats.title: A supply network built for distance.

items.desc: Cross-border parts pipeline sustaining 100 high-speed units through wartime logistics constraints since 2022.
Warsaw depot inventory orchestration covering the 123-tram fleet — reorder cycles tuned to municipal service windows.

cta.title: Need a supply chain that survives geography?
cta.subtitle: We design parts pipelines that hold up across borders, sanctions, and weather — engineered for the depots that depend on them.

hero.title: Maintenance is data.
hero.subtitle: Through our affiliate VISION IT's MMIS platform, every work order is timestamped, every part is traced, every fleet is observable.

whatWeDo.title: Five capabilities running on one platform.

items.title: Work order management
items.desc: Predictive scheduling that sequences maintenance against fleet availability, parts lead time, and crew capacity.

items.title: Inventory tracking
items.desc: Cross-depot visibility into every serialized part — consumption, location, and reorder threshold in one view.

items.title: Fleet observability
items.desc: Real-time component health from onboard telemetry, surfaced before symptoms reach the operator's ear.

items.title: Regulator reporting
items.desc: Auto-generated audit packages mapped to UIC, EBA, and operator-specific standards — submitted in days, not weeks.

items.title: Predictive maintenance
items.desc: Failure-before-failure flagging from telemetry patterns, escalated to the work order before the incident lands.
100 high-speed units fully tracked through MMIS — work orders, parts, and component health visible across borders.
Warsaw 123-tram fleet operated on MMIS — depot crews, inventory, and municipal audit reports flow through one system.

cta.title: See how the platform works.
cta.subtitle: VISION IT operates the MMIS platform that powers every Xapika maintenance program. Visit them directly for product detail and live demos.

hero.title: Revenue, designed into operations.
hero.subtitle: Station retail, concessions, and operational revenue programs that turn maintenance overhead into managed margin.

whatWeDo.title: Five disciplines that move cost into revenue.

items.title: Station retail concessions
items.desc: Operator-side leasing of platform retail with tenant mix designed for commuter dwell time, not airport spend.

items.title: Ancillary revenue
items.desc: Advertising, kiosks, and premium amenities structured into the operating contract — not bolted on after.

items.title: Service-level agreements
items.desc: Custom commercial frameworks tying maintenance availability to revenue share, with measurable triggers.

items.title: Operational consulting
items.desc: Revenue-stream design for new lines — modeled before track is laid, not after the first deficit year.

items.title: Stakeholder coordination
items.desc: Operator, regulator, and vendor alignment held together through written governance — not goodwill.

keyStats.title: Built per operator. Not per template.

items.desc: Commercial structuring layered onto the 123-tram maintenance contract — concession framework aligned to municipal policy.
Long-horizon commercial agreement on the 100 high-speed unit programme, structured to hold through wartime operations.

cta.title: Designing a new line? Let's structure the revenue side together.
cta.subtitle: We bring commercial design into the engineering conversation early — before the construction tender, not after the first operating year.
